articles.title: Locked in heated rivalry with researcher, Microsoft fixes 0-day they disclosed
articles.content: A separate zero-day also disclosed by Nightmare Eclipse appears to be patched as well.
articles.titleZh: 微软与研究人员激烈竞争，修复了他们披露的0天
articles.contentZh: Nightmare Eclipse披露的另一个零日似乎也被修补了。

articles.title: High-severity vulnerability in Linux caused by a single faulty character
articles.content: Use-after-free bug can be exploited to evade sandbox defenses.
articles.titleZh: Linux中由单个故障字符引起的高严重性漏洞
articles.contentZh: 自由使用后的漏洞可以被利用来逃避沙盒防御。

articles.title: For the 2nd time in weeks, Microsoft packages laced with credential stealer
articles.content: 73 packages run self-replicating stealer as soon as they're opened by an AI agent.
articles.titleZh: 几周内第二次， Microsoft软件包带有凭据窃取程序
articles.contentZh: 73个包裹在AI代理打开后立即运行自我复制窃取程序。

articles.title: How a USB-connected speaker can infect a PC without ever being touched
articles.content: Seller of the Sound Blaster Katana V2X doesn't consider the behavior a vulnerability.
articles.titleZh: 连接USB的扬声器如何在不被触摸的情况下感染PC
articles.contentZh: Sound Blaster Katana V2X的卖家不认为该行为是漏洞。

articles.title: So you want to buy a gaming handheld PC
articles.content: Gaming handhelds are amazing. They make it so much easier to fit all kinds of games into my day. Sadly, they’re less affordable than they’ve ever been — due to an unprecedented, AI-fueled shortage of memory chips, an unforced oil crisis, rampant inflation, fallout from tariffs, and more. But that’s not going to stop you. […]
articles.titleZh: 所以你想买一台游戏手持电脑
articles.contentZh: 游戏手持设备令人惊叹。它们使我更轻松地将各种游戏融入我的日常生活。可悲的是，由于前所未有的人工智能驱动的内存芯片短缺、非受迫性的石油危机、猖獗的通货膨胀、关税的影响等等，它们比以往任何时候都更便宜。但这并不能阻止你。[…]

articles.title: The Nintendo DS is still the best gaming handheld for travel
articles.content: Even with the looming specter of rising prices, there's never been a better time for portable gaming. The Steam Deck has ushered in a new era of handheld PCs, the Analogue Pocket and other Game Boy-style remakes are making retro games more approachable than ever, the Playdate has led to an alternate universe of weirdo […]
articles.titleZh: 任天堂DS仍然是最适合旅行的游戏手持设备
articles.contentZh: 即使价格上涨的幽灵迫在眉睫，便携式游戏也从未有过更好的时机。Steam Deck迎来了手持电脑的新时代， Analogue Pocket和其他Game Boy风格的翻拍使复古游戏比以往任何时候都更加平易近人， Playdate带来了另一个怪诞世界[…]
